payload.prompt_preview: You are running inside a benchmark workspace. Solve the task using only the provided tools and files inside the workspace. Do not assume access to evaluation files. Return a concise final summary.
You are running inside a benchmark workspace. Solve the task using only the provided tools and files inside the workspace. Do not assume access to evaluation files. Return a concise final summary.

payload.output_preview:
Summary (concise)

1) Most recent enforcement milestone
- The most recent major milestone that came into force was the start of the rules for General‑Purpose AI (GPAI) and related governance duties on 2 August 2025; the Commission published a voluntary General‑Purpose AI Code of Practice on 10 July 2025 to support that wave. ([eur-lex.europa.eu](https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2024/1689/?utm_source=openai))

2) Which obligations apply next (what product teams should expect)
- The next big compliance wave is the AI Act’s full high‑risk regime (Annex III and key transparency requirements). Those obligations are scheduled to apply from 2 August 2026 unless and until the Commission/legislature alters the dates. Obligations in that wave include (among others): risk‑management systems, data governance and bias mitigation, technical documentation and logging, human‑oversight measures, conformity assessment (third‑party notified bodies where required), registration in the EU database, post‑m...<truncated>
